ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event that occurred */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The exact date and time when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* The geographical location (latitude and longitude) of the user */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* A unique identifier for the session during which the activity occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* The version of the operating system */,
  "browser_version" TEXT /* The version of the browser used */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* The URL of the page that referred the user to the current page */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the activity in seconds */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the user is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user within the platform */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* The date when the user signed up */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* The first name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* The last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* The physical address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON column to store user preferences */,
  "locale" TEXT /* The locale (language and region) of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* The type of event (e.g., authentication, navigation, transaction) */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the event (e.g., user, system, security) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* The priority level of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* The type of action (e.g., form submission, button click, page view) */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the action (e.g., user interaction, system operation) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* The priority level of the action (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the log */,
  "event_count" INTEGER /* Total number of events for the user on that day */,
  "action_count" INTEGER /* Total number of actions for the user on that day */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* The date for which the log is recorded */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* The total duration of all activities for the user on that day */,
  "session_count" INTEGER /* The number of sessions the user had on that day */,
  "active_duration" INTEGER /* The total active duration of the user on that day */,
  "inactive_duration" INTEGER /* The total inactive duration of the user on that day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the role has administrative privileges */,
  "description" TEXT /* A description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the permission allows */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role-permission association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_actions" (
  "event_action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event-action association */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_actions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_actions_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)
